scores.correctness_notes: Accurate on all key points: collect_unit_status/collect_app_status distinction, leader-only app status, add_status() API, ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus prohibition. The displayed priority order omits 'error' at the top (showing blocked > maintenance > waiting > active instead of error > blocked > ...) but this is a minor display omission since the response correctly notes ErrorStatus cannot be used with add_status().
